load-pdf-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Load PDF and Apply Edits with PdfPageEditor
load-pdf-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file, binding it to PdfPageEditor, optionally configuring rotation, zoom, or page size, applying the changes, and saving the edited document.

rotate-pdf-pages-memory-stream.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor from a Memory Stream
rotate-pdf-pages-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF into a MemoryStream, binding it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, rotating all pages, and saving the result without writing the original file back to disk.

edit-pdf-pages-zoom-rotation.title: Edit PDF Pages with Zoom and Rotation using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-pages-zoom-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply zoom and rotation to its pages with PdfPageEditor, and save the edited document to a new file.

save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream-using-.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream-using-.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF page's zoom factor with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and save the resulting document directly into a MemoryStream for further in‑memory processing.

rotate-specific-pdf-page.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to rotate page 2 of a PDF by 90 degrees using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and its PageRotations dictionary.

rotate-specific-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages by 180 Degrees
rotate-specific-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate selected pages (3, 5, and 7) of a PDF by 180° using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-specific-pdf-page__v2.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade and save the result.

retrieve-pdf-page-size.title: Retrieve Size of a Specific PDF Page
retrieve-pdf-page-size.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfPageEditor and call GetPageSize to obtain the width and height of page 2 for logging.

retrieve-pdf-page-rotation.title: Retrieve PDF Page Rotation
retrieve-pdf-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with PdfPageEditor and obtain the rotation angle of a specific page (page 4) using GetPageRotation.

resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter.description: Shows how to use PdfPageEditor to change the size of a single page (page 6) in a PDF to Letter dimensions and save the modified document.

adjust-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.title: Adjust Zoom of Specific PDF Page
adjust-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a 150% zoom factor for page three of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

apply-zoom-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Even Pages in PDF
apply-zoom-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a 1.2 (120%) zoom factor on all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-page-transition-fade-2sec.title: Set Page Transition to Fade with 2‑Second Duration
set-page-transition-fade-2sec.description: Shows how to apply a Fade transition lasting two seconds to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to a PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set a dissolve page transition with a 3‑second duration on page 5 of a PDF document.

set-display-duration-for-pdf-page.title: Set Display Duration for a PDF Page
set-display-duration-for-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set the display duration of a specific PDF page (page 5) to five seconds using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

left-align-page-two-pdf.title: Left Align Page Two in PDF using PdfPageEditor
left-align-page-two-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF document by using the PdfPageEditor facade and its HorizontalAlignment property.

vertically-align-page-3-top.title: Vertically Align Page 3 to Top
vertically-align-page-3-top.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to set the vertical alignment of page 3 to the top and save the modified PDF.

resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying a 10% margin on each side.

resize-pdf-page-contents-custom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Custom Margins
resize-pdf-page-contents-custom-margins.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of specific PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) using custom left and right margins with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

rotate-first-page-of-pdfs.title: Rotate First Page of PDFs in a Folder
rotate-first-page-of-pdfs.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files in a directory and rotate the first page of each document by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to loop through multiple PDF files and use PdfPageEditor to resize every page to A4, saving the converted documents to a designated folder.

rotate-resize-pdf-page-to-letter.title: Rotate and Resize PDF Page to Letter
rotate-resize-pdf-page-to-letter.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 of a PDF by 90 degrees and change its dimensions to Letter size using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor class.

zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to select specific non‑consecutive pages of a PDF using PdfPageEditor.ProcessPages and apply a common zoom factor to those pages.

set-transition-duration-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Transition Duration for a Range of PDF Pages
set-transition-duration-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to select specific pages via the Pages collection and set each page's transition duration to one second using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.title: Rotate PDF Pages with Validation using Aspose.Pdf
rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate a rotation angle (0, 90, 180, 270) and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

handle-invalid-page-rotation.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
handle-invalid-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to safely set a page rotation using PdfPageEditor and catch invalid rotation values to avoid runtime errors.

create-contentsresizeparameters-uniform-.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-uniform-.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with absolute margin values of five points for left, right, top, and bottom sides using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-uniform-15-percent-margin-resize-.title: Create Uniform 15% Margin Resize Parameters
create-uniform-15-percent-margin-resize-.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with 15% margins on all sides using the MarginsPercent method, which can then be passed to PdfFileEditor methods for content scaling.

apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and set a distinct zoom factor using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-fade-transition-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Fade (Dissolve) Transition to All PDF Pages
apply-fade-transition-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a fade-like (Dissolve) page transition for every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

assign-page-transitions-by-content.title: Assign Page Transitions Based on Content Type
assign-page-transitions-by-content.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, detect if a page contains images, and apply different page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.title: Set Per‑Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-per-page-display-duration-based-on-w.description: Demonstrates how to calculate a display duration for each PDF page proportional to its word count and apply it using Aspose.Pdf facades, enabling controlled reading time per page.

edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, bind it to PdfPageEditor, apply zoom and rotation to all pages, and save the edited document to another memory stream.

chain-page-transformations-pdf.title: Chain Page Transformations (Rotation, Zoom, Size) with PdfPageEditor
chain-page-transformations-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply multiple page modifications—rotation, zoom, size, and position shift—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor before saving the updated PDF.

reset-page-rotation.title: Reset Rotation of a Specific PDF Page
reset-page-rotation.description: Shows how to reset the rotation of page 6 in a PDF document to 0 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

revert-page-size-to-original.title: Revert PDF Page Size to Original Dimensions
revert-page-size-to-original.description: Shows how to capture a page's original size, modify it, and then restore the original dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

audit-pdf-page-dimensions-rotation.title: Audit PDF Page Dimensions and Rotation Before and After Edits
audit-pdf-page-dimensions-rotation.description: Shows how to log each page's width, height, and rotation before and after applying changes with PdfPageEditor, then rotate all pages and save an audit log.

safe-get-pdf-page-size.title: Safely Retrieve PDF Page Size with Try‑Catch
safe-get-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to obtain page dimensions while handling requests for non‑existent pages using try‑catch blocks. Includes creation of a sample PDF for testing.

apply-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Horizontal Alignment to PDF Pages
apply-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set left horizontal alignment for all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the vertical alignment of specific pages to the top and save the modified PDF.

apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply BoxOut Transition to PDF Page
apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set a BoxOut (OUTBOX) page transition with a 3‑second duration on a specific page of a PDF document.

apply-cover-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Cover Transition to a PDF Page
apply-cover-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Creates a four‑page PDF and uses PdfPageEditor to set a Cover page transition with a one‑second duration on page 4, then saves the result.

set-zoom-page-5-75-percent.title: Set Zoom of Page 5 to 75% with PdfPageEditor
set-zoom-page-5-75-percent.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the zoom level of a specific page (page 5) to 75% and save the modified PDF.

set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.title: Set Zoom on Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
set-zoom-on-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to apply a 2.0 zoom factor (200% magnification) to page 7 of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-page-contents-5-percent.title: Resize PDF Page Contents by 5% Using PdfFileEditor
resize-pdf-page-contents-5-percent.description: Demonstrates how to uniformly shrink all page elements by 5% using the PdfFileEditor facade's ResizeContentsPct method.

add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 20% Margins to PDF Pages
add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a 20 % margin around all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade for printing purposes.

convert-pdf-to-landscape-a4.title: Convert PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
convert-pdf-to-landscape-a4.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page orientation from portrait to landscape by setting the A4 page size and enabling the landscape flag using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's size to landscape by swapping width and height with PdfPageEditor, rotating the content, and confirming the new dimensions.

rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transition.title: Rotate PDF Page 180° While Preserving Transition
rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transition.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade without affecting any existing transition effects on the page.

resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages.title: Resize PDF Contents and Rotate Pages by 90 Degrees
resize-pdf-contents-rotate-pages.description: Shows how to shrink PDF page contents to a specified percentage and then rotate all pages 90° using Aspose.Pdf facades.

incremental-update-pdf-text-annotation.title: Incrementally Update PDF with Text Annotation
incremental-update-pdf-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a text annotation to a PDF and saving the changes using incremental update mode to preserve the original file structure.

edit-pdf-with-backup-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF and Preserve Original with Backup
edit-pdf-with-backup-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Creates a backup of the source PDF, modifies the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor (e.g., changes zoom), and saves the edited version as a new file while keeping the original unchanged.

set-display-duration-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Pages (Slideshow)
set-display-duration-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to assign a display duration to each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor, enabling a timed slideshow presentation.

apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Split Transition to PDF Page
apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a split page transition and a 2‑second duration for a specific page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

disable-page-transition-animation.title: Disable Page Transition Animation in PDF
disable-page-transition-animation.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, thereby disabling the page transition animation.

apply-sequential-page-transitions.title: Apply Sequential Page Transitions in a PDF
apply-sequential-page-transitions.description: Shows how to assign different transition effects to consecutive pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor, set the Zoom property to 1.0 (100 % scaling) for all pages, apply the changes, and save the updated file.

zoom-odd-numbered-pdf-pages.title: Zoom Odd-Numbered PDF Pages
zoom-odd-numbered-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply a 1.2x zoom factor to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF document.

apply-zoom-to-even-pdf-pages__v2.title: Apply Zoom to Even PDF Pages
apply-zoom-to-even-pdf-pages__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to set a zoom factor of 0.8 on all even‑numbered pages of a PDF document and save the result.

resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Pages to US Letter Size
resize-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the page size of pages 3‑6 to US Letter dimensions (8.5" x 11").

resize-last-page-to-a5.title: Resize Last PDF Page to A5 for Booklet
resize-last-page-to-a5.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of the final page of a PDF to A5, creating a compact booklet format.

rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 270°
rotate-every-third-page-270-degrees.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to select every third page of a PDF and rotate it 270 degrees, creating alternating landscape orientation.

retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.title: Retrieve Page Size After Rotation
retrieve-page-size-after-rotation.description: Loads a PDF, reads the original size of the first page, rotates the page by 90° using PdfPageEditor, then obtains the new page size to confirm the orientation change and saves the modified document.

retrieve-verify-page-rotation-after-resi.title: Retrieve and Verify Page Rotation After Resizing PDF Page
retrieve-verify-page-rotation-after-resi.description: Loads a PDF, captures the original rotation of a page, changes the page size with PdfPageEditor, and confirms that the rotation value remains unchanged after the resize.

apply-custom-page-transitions.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions in PDF
apply-custom-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to assign different transition effects to each page of a PDF based on its index, then save the modified document.

set-per-page-display-duration.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration in PDF
set-per-page-display-duration.description: Shows how to assign a different display duration to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second for each subsequent page.

center-content-on-page-two.title: Center Content on Specific PDF Page
center-content-on-page-two.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to horizontally center the existing content of page 2 in a PDF document.

align-vertical-content-page-three.title: Vertically Align PDF Page Content to Center
align-vertical-content-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to center the original content vertically on a specific page (page 3) of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-horizontal-alignment-zoom-page.title: Set Horizontal Alignment and Zoom for a Specific PDF Page
set-horizontal-alignment-zoom-page.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to center‑align content and apply a zoom factor to page 4 of a PDF document.

add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 10% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to add a 10 % margin on all sides of every page in a PDF and save the result as a new file.

batch-set-fade-transition-for-pdf-slides.title: Batch Set Fade Transition for PDF Slideshow
batch-set-fade-transition-for-pdf-slides.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Fade (Dissolve) page transition with a 2‑second duration to all pages of a 200‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-from-network-stream.title: Rotate PDF Pages from a Network Stream using Aspose.Pdf
rotate-pdf-pages-from-network-stream.description: Demonstrates downloading a PDF via HttpClient, loading it into a MemoryStream, rotating all pages with PdfPageEditor, and saving the modified document back to the same stream.

resize-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize PDF Pages to A4
resize-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, sets every page to A4 portrait dimensions, and saves the modified document to a new file.

edit-pdf-pages-with-pdfpageeditor-dispos.title: Edit PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor and Proper Disposal
edit-pdf-pages-with-pdfpageeditor-dispos.description: Shows how to rotate and zoom PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor while correctly disposing the editor and document to release file handles.

set-custom-page-size-pdfpageeditor.title: Set Custom Page Size with PdfPageEditor
set-custom-page-size-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard values using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageSize property.

rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor, applying changes, and saving the modified document.

set-page-transitions-fade-boxout-cover.title: Set Page Transition Effects (Fade, BoxOut, Cover) in PDF
set-page-transitions-fade-boxout-cover.description: Demonstrates applying different page transition types (Fade/Dissolve, BoxOut, Cover) to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-pdf-page-zoom.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom.description: Demonstrates how to apply a precise zoom factor to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor for high‑resolution scaling.

set-slide-display-duration-pdf.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Pages
set-slide-display-duration-pdf.description: Shows how to assign a per‑page display duration (and optional transition) to a PDF presentation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-horizontal-alignment-pdf.title: Set Horizontal Alignment of PDF Page Content
set-horizontal-alignment-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfPageEditor facade to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, right) of all content on a PDF page and save the modified document.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF, applying equal 10% margins on each side.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents with different left and right margins (asymmetric design) while keeping top and bottom margins proportional.

resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.title: Resize PDF Contents with Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to resize page contents by specifying separate top and bottom margins, including creating a sample PDF when none exists.

rotate-pdf-page-restore-orientation.title: Rotate PDF Page and Restore Original Orientation
rotate-pdf-page-restore-orientation.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page using PdfPageEditor, save the rotated file, then reset the rotation to its original value and save the restored document.

resize-pdf-page-and-revert.title: Resize PDF Page and Revert to Original Size
resize-pdf-page-and-revert.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's dimensions with PdfPageEditor, save the resized file, then restore the original size to verify undo functionality.

log-pdf-page-modifications.title: Log PDF Page Property Modifications
log-pdf-page-modifications.description: Demonstrates how to rotate PDF pages, change their background color, and record each change to a log file for audit and debugging using Aspose.Pdf.

report-page-properties-before-after-edit.title: Report Page Properties Before and After Editing PDF
report-page-properties-before-after-edit.description: Shows how to read page size, rotation, and zoom values, apply rotation, zoom, and size changes with PdfPageEditor, and generate a before/after report.

rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.title: Rotate Pages of Encrypted PDF
rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by providing a password, binding it to PdfPageEditor, rotating all pages 90 degrees, and saving the edited document.

modify-pages-in-signed-pdf.title: Modify Pages in Signed PDF While Preserving Signatures
modify-pages-in-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to rotate, zoom, and resize pages of a digitally signed PDF using PdfPageEditor, saving the changes as an incremental update to keep existing signatures valid.

resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to change the page size of a PDF (e.g., to A4) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade while keeping existing content and annotations intact.

rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form.title: Rotate PDF Pages While Preserving Form Data
rotate-pdf-pages-preserve-form.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields to FDF, rotate all pages, and re‑import the fields so that form data remains correctly positioned after the rotation.

add-transition-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Transition Effect to Odd PDF Pages
add-transition-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a page transition only to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-display-duration-on-even-pdf-pages.title: Set Display Duration on Even PDF Pages
set-display-duration-on-even-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom display duration for only the even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

zoom-pages-with-images.title: Zoom Pages Containing Images in PDF
zoom-pages-with-images.description: Demonstrates how to detect pages that contain image objects in a PDF and apply a zoom factor only to those pages using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.title: Resize PDF Contents Only on Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-only-on-text-pages.description: Scans a PDF to find pages that contain text and then resizes the contents of only those pages using PdfFileEditor with margin parameters.

apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.title: Apply Rotation, Zoom, and Transition Effects to PDF Pages
apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to rotate and zoom PDF pages and add presentation transition effects using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-size-a4-landscape.title: Set PDF Page Size to A4 Landscape
set-pdf-page-size-a4-landscape.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to custom A4 landscape dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageSize class.

set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait
set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.description: Shows how to change all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions (8.5" x 11") using the Aspose.Pdf PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Landscape PDF Pages to Portrait
rotate-landscape-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to detect landscape pages in a PDF and rotate them 90 degrees to portrait orientation using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, creates a placeholder title, calculates a transition duration from the title length, and applies a page transition using the PdfPageEditor facade.

adjust-pdf-page-zoom-by-word-count.title: Adjust PDF Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-pdf-page-zoom-by-word-count.description: Shows how to count words on each PDF page and apply a dynamic zoom factor with PdfPageEditor to improve readability.

batch-resize-pdf-pages-by-filename.title: Batch Resize PDF Pages Based on Filename Keywords
batch-resize-pdf-pages-by-filename.description: Shows how to iterate through PDFs in a folder, pick a target page size from a keyword map derived from the file name, and apply that size to all pages using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Uniform Margins
merge-pdfs-with-uniform-margins.description: Shows how to add consistent margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.title: Resize PDF Pages and Split into Chapter Files
resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.description: Demonstrates how to uniformly resize all pages of a PDF and then split the resized document into separate chapter PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions
create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into a slideshow by configuring page transition type, transition duration, and display duration using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-boxout-transition-and-zoom.title: Set BoxOut Transition and Zoom on a PDF Page
set-boxout-transition-and-zoom.description: Shows how to apply a BoxOut page transition with a 1.3 zoom factor to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

center-align-page-set-display-duration.title: Center Align PDF Page and Set Display Duration
center-align-page-set-display-duration.description: Demonstrates how to center‑align the content of a specific PDF page and set its display duration to four seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.title: Add 5% Margins to PDF Pages and Print
add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a 5 % margin to all pages of a PDF using PdfFileEditor, then print the resized document with PdfViewer's AutoResize feature.

add-percentage-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 15% Margins to Selected PDF Pages
add-percentage-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 15 % margin on all sides of specific pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, suitable for creating a booklet layout.

rotate-pdf-pages-for-brochure.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pdf-pages-for-brochure.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation and set the page size to A4 using the PdfPageEditor facade, preparing the document for brochure printing.

set-pdf-page-size-to-a3.title: Set PDF Page Size to A3 Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-size-to-a3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, change its page size to A3 with the PdfPageEditor facade, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-zoom-preview-final-output.title: Set PDF Zoom for Preview and Scale for Final Output
set-pdf-zoom-preview-final-output.description: Demonstrates creating a preview PDF with 50 % zoom using PdfPageEditor and configuring a PdfViewer with 100 % scale for final output.

apply-page-settings-from-json.title: Apply Page Settings from JSON to PDF
apply-page-settings-from-json.description: Shows how to read a JSON configuration file and apply per‑page properties such as rotation, zoom, alignment, display duration, and transition effects to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.title: Hybrid Content Resize with Mixed Percent and Unit Margins
hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.description: Demonstrates how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object with both percentage‑based and absolute margins and apply it to all pages using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents.

apply-page-transitions-per-index.title: Apply Different Page Transitions per PDF Page
apply-page-transitions-per-index.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages and assign different transition effects (vertical blinds, horizontal blinds, dissolve) using PdfPageEditor based on the page index modulo three.

rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.title: Rotate, Resize and Zoom PDF Pages
rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, change page size, apply a zoom factor, and save the transformed PDF.
